text:
Except as otherwise expressly provided in this chapter, this title shall be exclusively controlling:

Upon the registration, numbering and regulation of motor vehicles and motorcycles; and

On their use of public highways.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 13. Application of This Title
##### § 400 — Application of this title

Except as otherwise expressly provided in this chapter, this title shall be exclusively controlling:

Upon the registration, numbering and regulation of motor vehicles and motorcycles; and

On their use of public highways.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

On their use of public highways.
